notes: eGFR 42, A1c 8.1, mild edema. Independent eating, normal swallow.

decision.meal_plan_summary: 3 meals, ~45 g carb each, low-sodium seasonings, controlled-K fruits.
decision.adime_summary: Dx: altered nutrition related to DM + CKD. Intervention: CHO-controlled renal diet, Na/K limits. M/E: A1c, eGFR, weight, edema.

notes: SLP recommends mechanically altered diet and mildly thick liquids. Poor intake, weight loss 4 kg/month.

decision.meal_plan_summary: Minced moist meals, fortified, oral nutrition supplements between meals.
decision.adime_summary: Dx: chewing/swallowing difficulty with inadequate intake. Intervention: texture-modified high-energy diet + ONS. M/E: weight, intake %, aspiration signs.

notes: BP 148/94. Motivated for weight loss. Normal labs otherwise.

decision.meal_plan_summary: High-vegetable DASH meals, lean protein, portion control.
decision.adime_summary: Dx: excessive energy intake. Intervention: hypocaloric DASH diet, behavior goals. M/E: weight, BP, waist.

notes: Recently diagnosed, learning label reading. No other restriction.

decision.meal_plan_summary: Naturally GF whole foods, certified GF grains, label education.
decision.adime_summary: Dx: food intolerance (gluten). Intervention: strict GF diet + education. M/E: symptoms, tTG-IgA, micronutrients.

notes: NYHA III, fluid overload on admission. A1c 7.6.

decision.meal_plan_summary: Low-sodium cardiac meals, carb-consistent, fluids tracked.
decision.adime_summary: Dx: excessive fluid/sodium intake risk with DM. Intervention: Na + fluid restricted cardiac diet, CHO control. M/E: weight, edema, BG, I/O.

notes: Pediatric, growing well. Strict avoidance, carries epinephrine.

decision.meal_plan_summary: Balanced pediatric meals, strict nut-free sourcing.
decision.adime_summary: Dx: food allergy management. Intervention: allergen-free diet + family education. M/E: growth, reactions.

notes: BMI 19.6 and falling, breathless during meals, early satiety.

decision.meal_plan_summary: Energy-dense small meals q2-3h, fortified, lactose-free ONS.
decision.adime_summary: Dx: protein-energy malnutrition. Intervention: HEHP lactose-free diet + ONS. M/E: weight, intake %, hand-grip.

decision.meal_plan_summary: High-protein renal meals, low-K/low-P choices, fluid tracked.
decision.adime_summary: Dx: altered renal nutrient needs on HD. Intervention: high-protein renal diet, K/P/fluid limits. M/E: K, P, fluid gain, albumin.
Dx: altered carbohydrate metabolism in pregnancy. Intervention: CHO-controlled prenatal diet. M/E: BG logs, weight gain, fetal growth.

notes: Refuses utensils, pockets food. SLP: pureed + mildly thick. Comfort-focused.

decision.meal_plan_summary: Pureed meals, fortified, offered frequently with assistance; comfort prioritized.
decision.adime_summary: Dx: self-feeding + swallowing deficit. Intervention: pureed comfort-focused diet, feeding support. M/E: intake, weight, aspiration, comfort.

notes: ALT mildly elevated, LDL high. Sedentary.

decision.meal_plan_summary: Mediterranean pattern, olive oil, fish, whole grains, low added sugar.
decision.adime_summary: Dx: excessive energy/sat-fat intake with NAFLD. Intervention: Mediterranean hypocaloric diet. M/E: weight, ALT, lipids.

notes: POD 4, advancing diet. High-output stoma risk.

decision.meal_plan_summary: Low-fiber soft meals, adequate protein for healing, small frequent.
decision.adime_summary: Dx: altered GI function post-op. Intervention: low-fiber high-protein advancing diet. M/E: stoma output, tolerance, wound healing, weight.
